# 提问的智慧

- [提问的智慧](/docs): 一份关于技术提问、求知姿态与协作伦理的阅读指南。
- [引言](/docs/statement)
- [简介](/docs/introduction)
- [在提问之前](/docs/before-questions)
- 正在提问时

  - [用清晰、正确、精准的语句](/docs/when-questions/use-correctly-sentence)
  - [使用标准的文件格式发送问题](/docs/when-questions/use-easy-to-read-file-format)

  - [话再多而不在精](/docs/when-questions/not-more-words-but-essence)
  - [别动辄声称找到 Bug](/docs/when-questions/not-say-find-bug-easily)
  - [低声下气不能代替你的功课](/docs/when-questions/humble-not-substitute-homewoek)
  - [描述问题症状而非你的猜测](/docs/when-questions/describe-symptoms-not-guesses)
  - [按时间先后列出问题](/docs/when-questions/list-problems-by-time)
  - [描述目标而不是过程](/docs/when-questions/describe-goal-not-process)
  - [别要求使用私人电邮回复](/docs/when-questions/donnot-ask-for-private-email)
  - [明确表达你的问题以及需求](/docs/when-questions/clearly-express-your-question)

  - [不要在标题写`紧急`](/docs/when-questions/never-write-urgent)
  - [礼多人不怪](/docs/when-questions/courtesy-costs-nothing)
